reference: Hello, I had stitches on my top left lip and I also lost my tooth, the one that is located beneath my lip wound. I have had the stitches for six days. Today I went to the doctor; yesterday he said a part got infected and prescribed me antibiotics. This means that it is going to take longer for my lip to heal and I cannot go to the dentist yet.
text: Hello! I had stickers on my top left lip, and I also lost my teeth, so one of them is located beneath my lip band. I have had the stickers for six days. Today I went to the doctor. Yesterday he said a heart got infected and prescribed me antibiotics. This means it is going to take longer for my lip to heal and I cannot go to the dentist yet.
